title: Thunderbird Android
creator: gv.gv
content:
Hi, great mail client! I have two email accounts and would like to suggest:

(1) Switching from one account to the other takes too many clicks. By using the three lines top left, I would like to get to the ACOUNTS LIST directly. That could be implemented as a switch in the settings or as an own button/icon on the pages of the mail items.

(2) Next to the sub directories I would like to see the number of total mails per folder - not only the new ones. The desktop version has that feature.

Thank you for considering my suggestions. Best regards, Gert1
metadata: ;useragent:Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64; rv:147.0) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/147.0
